name: agyb-aas-devops-cloud
description: Install the "AAS DevOps & Cloud" workflow plugin from Antigravity Awesome Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Ship infrastructure, deployments, CI, environments, rollback plans, troubleshooting, and incident-ready operations.
interface.longDescription: Ship infrastructure, deployments, CI, environments, rollback plans, troubleshooting, and incident-ready operations. Strong plugin candidate because it combines deterministic scripts, cloud patterns, deployment safety, and incident workflows. Recommended for: Platform teams, Startup engineers owning deployment, Cloud and DevOps maintainers. Not for: Frontend-only UI polish, Product analytics-only work. Covers Docker Expert, AWS Serverless, and 8 more skills.
defaultPrompt: Use this plugin to review this deployment for risk, rollback, environment, and CI gaps.
Use this plugin to design a small-team cloud deployment plan with Terraform, CI, and runbook steps.
Use this plugin to troubleshoot this failed deployment and prepare an incident response checklist.
